fields.description: Chemical name, reading name, inspection question or cleaning task.
fields.label: Label

fields.description: Chemical Dosing only: the stock Item consumed.
fields.label: Item

fields.description: Chemical Dosing only: the quantity usually used — one tap on the visit form's stepper pre-fills it.
fields.label: Usual Qty

fields.description: Chemical Dosing only: the visit form's +/− stepper increment, e.g. 0.5.
fields.label: Qty Step

fields.description: Water Chemistry only: reading unit, e.g. ppm, mV, pH.
fields.label: Unit

fields.description: Water Chemistry only: lowest acceptable reading.
fields.label: Min Value

fields.description: Water Chemistry only: highest acceptable reading.
fields.label: Max Value

fields.description: Equipment Inspection only: one choice per line. Blank = Pass / Fail / Replace / Other.
fields.label: Options
